title: verbascum siculum
intro: Verbascum siculum is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum siculum include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
